auditors.finding: Current repo already has route registry summary fields and separately bounded support packet actions, but the support packets are explicitly non-truth-bearing.

Current surfaces support the existing table summary and secondary support metadata, but a dedicated route-detail screen remains deferred pending a bounded packet; selected/primary/failover/secret-heavy detail is not admitted.

profile packet explicitly blocks runtime claims and evidence capture is not network-dependent runtime proof
